closure_state: PARTIAL CLOSURE — PRIMARY METHODS IDENTIFY CHONLUTEN AS GLU-ASP-GLY (EDG) AND HUMAN THP-1 CELL-CULTURE EVIDENCE EXISTS; CH20 TERMINI, SALT, ANALYTICAL IDENTITY, STERILITY AND HUMAN CLINICAL BENEFIT OPEN
authoritative_product_boundary: A 2022 primary paper explicitly identifies Chonluten as Glu-Asp-Gly (EDG) and reports in-vitro signalling and inflammatory readouts in THP-1 monocytes/macrophages. The study is not a human treatment trial and does not establish CH20 equivalence, respiratory-disease efficacy or systemic immune benefit.
critical_closure_controls: EDG primary-study identity is not CH20 analytical proof
THP-1 cell-line findings are not human clinical efficacy
Do not transfer Bronchogen AEDL evidence to Chonluten EDG
No respiratory, immune, infection or anti-inflammatory treatment claim
No dosing, injection or reconstitution protocol
